question: How many pages does a typical session view?
sql: WITH per_session AS (SELECT session_id, COUNT(*) AS events FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.events` GROUP BY session_id) SELECT ROUND(AVG(events), 1) AS avg_events_per_session, APPROX_QUANTILES(events, 2)[OFFSET(1)] AS median_events FROM per_session
analyst_notes: Session depth is skewed by bots and bounces — report the median next to the mean; when they diverge, the median is the 'typical' session. APPROX_QUANTILES is the cheap BigQuery median.
author: claude-draft
